summary: v0.11 scope locked: MCP-first context delivery + continuous raw capture. Previous scope (dual-output + Cursor + Tier 3) replaced.

content.decision: v0.11 is MCP-first only. Five phases: (1) mom_status tool, (2) raw capture via hooks, (3) minimal boot file, (4) session-log simplification, (5) Herald/Drafter spike + implementation.
content.context: MemPalace study (48k stars) revealed two gaps in MOM: no continuous capture and heavy boot files. Anthropic MCP guidance ('Design for the agent') confirmed MCP-first as the right path. Previous v0.11 scope (dual-output capture, Cursor adapter, TUI monitor, Clearance) deferred to v0.12.
impact: Boot file shrinks from ~3800 tokens to ~350 tokens
Session-logs become optional (raw is audit trail)
Adapters shrink to MCP config + hooks + minimal boot trigger
